title: A method for video encoding/decoding and an apparatus and a computer program product for implementing the method
abstract: The invention relates to method and technical equipment for encoding and decoding. A first scalability layer comprises at least a first coded picture. The first coded picture is reconstructed into a first reconstructed picture. A second coded picture is encoded on a second scalability layer, wherein said encoding comprises: reconstructing a second reconstructed picture by resampling at least a part of the first reconstructed picture;indicating that one of the following is used as a reference for the second coded picture: the first coded picture or the first reconstructed picture; and that no prediction error is present in the second coded picture. Third coded picture is encoded on a third scalability layer, the third scalability layer representing a different view or view direction than the first scalability layer, by using the second reconstructed picture as a reference forinter-view sample prediction or inter-view motion prediction for the third coded picture.
